backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types (UserProfile, UserSettings, Experience) and query/update methods for experiences and user profiles, with access control, blob storage mixins, and migration applied on upgrade.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms stored actor state on upgrade, specifically migrating the Gender type from OldGender (male/female) to NewGender (male/female/other) for both UserProfile and UserSettings maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: fixing Settings page auth via useSessionAuth, adding an 'Other' gender option, and adding a Change Password section with toast feedback.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for both light and dark themes, including sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Dini.Verse React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TSX module with favicon and viewport meta tags.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider, TranslationProvider, and Toaster for global context.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccountsDis: UI component that displays a 'Login Required' message with Log In and Sign Up buttons that navigate to internal routes using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthButtons: Renders login/signup buttons for unauthenticated users or a logout button for authenticated users, clearing the query cache and redirecting on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireProf: Guards child content behind authentication, showing a login/signup prompt with navigation buttons if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/create/builder2d: Provides an interactive canvas for the 2D builder, handling mouse-driven drag-and-drop and corner-handle resizing of builder elements.
Renders a file input button that reads an uploaded image as a data URL and adds it as a decal to the 2D builder.
Displays controls to bring forward, send backward, or delete the currently selected builder element.
Shows sliders and inputs to edit position, opacity, rotation, color, and size properties of the selected builder element.
Manages saving, loading, exporting, importing, and deleting named canvas prop presets using the useBuilder2DProps hook.
Renders buttons to add rectangle, circle, or triangle shapes to the 2D builder canvas.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Crea: Renders a follow/unfollow button for a creator's principal, hiding itself when viewing one's own profile or when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Expe: Displays an experience as a card with thumbnail, title, description, and creator name, navigating to the experience detail page on click.
Renders a responsive grid of ExperienceCard components with loading skeletons and an empty-state message when no experiences are available.
Displays thumbs-up/thumbs-down rating buttons for an experience, requiring authentication and using the useRateExperience mutation to submit ratings.
frontend/src/components/experiences/InGa: Provides a fixed in-game menu button that opens dialogs for leaving the game, resetting the character (with confirmation), and accessing placeholder settings.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Publ: A dialog form for publishing a new experience, handling title, description, category, gameplay controls, and optional thumbnail upload with progress tracking via useCreateExperience.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component that composes SiteHeader, LeftSidebar, a main content outlet, and SiteFooter into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChang: A deprecated placeholder component that renders nothing, previously used to display an authentication change banner.
frontend/src/components/layout/LeftSideb: Renders a hidden-on-mobile left navigation sidebar with translated links to Profile, Social, Inventory, Groups, and Settings pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Displays a simple footer with a copyright notice and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky top header with the site logo, desktop navigation buttons, auth controls, and a collapsible mobile menu for all main routes.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Displays a user's profile card with their avatar, display name, and quick-action buttons for Discover and Publish Experience, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/social/Following: Shows a list of followed creators with their avatars and unfollow buttons, fetching data via useGetFollowedCreators and supporting unfollow via useUnfollowCreator.
frontend/src/components/social/FriendsPa: React component that provides a friends management UI, including searching for users, sending/accepting/declining friend requests, and unfriending, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/social/MessagesP: React component that renders a two-panel messaging UI allowing users to search for other users, select a conversation, and send/view messages with loading states.
frontend/src/components/social/PartiesPa: Placeholder React component displaying a 'Party System Coming Soon' card with no functional implementation yet.
frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext: React context provider that supplies a translation function `t` based on the user's language setting, with fallback to English for missing keys.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccountSettings.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user account settings (display name, avatar, visibility, language, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2D.ts: Custom hook managing state for a 2D canvas builder, supporting adding, selecting, updating, deleting, reordering, and clearing shape/decal elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2DProps.ts: Custom hook for persisting and managing saved 2D builder prop configurations in localStorage, with save, delete, export, and import operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Thin wrapper hook around `useSessionAuth` that exposes the current authenticated user's username and display name, or null if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperiences.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, searching, filtering, creating, and rating experiences via the backend actor, with several mutations stubbed out as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Consolidates React Query hooks for user profiles and experiences (fetch, search, create, rate) into a single file, with several mutations stubbed as unimplemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionAuth.ts: Implements a localStorage-backed session authentication hook with login, signup, and logout functionality using a simple in-memory user store and non-cryptographic token generation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFollowing.ts: Provides placeholder React Query hooks for a creator following system (follow, unfollow, follower count, is-following), all disabled or stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFriends.ts: Provides React Query hooks for a friends system (list friends, pending requests, send/respond to requests, unfriend), all stubbed as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialMessages.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and sending direct messages between principals, with both query and mutation stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialParties.ts: Provides a single disabled placeholder hook for fetching the current party, pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Re-exports the translation context hook from TranslationContext as a convenience wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDiscovery.ts: Provides a disabled React Query hook for searching users by term, returning an empty array until backend session-based user search is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles (current user, by principal, and sign-up), all currently disabled/stubbed pending backend session auth implementation.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Exports a translations object containing English UI strings organized by feature area (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.) for i18n support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Outfit font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AvatarShop.tsx: Placeholder page for the Avatar Shop displaying category cards (Clothing, Accessories, Premium Items, Animations) with a 'Coming Soon' message and disabled browse button.
frontend/src/pages/Create.tsx: Landing page for the Create section that presents two navigation cards: one for the 2D Games Builder and one for the UGC Accessories creator.
Full-page 2D game builder editor layout composing ShapePalette, DecalUploader, LayerControls, BuilderCanvas, PropertiesPanel, and PropsPanel components driven by the useBuilder2D hook.
Placeholder page for the UGC Accessories Creator showing a 'Coming Soon' message with a back-navigation button to the Create landing page.
frontend/src/pages/DiniBucks.tsx: Displays the Dini Bucks virtual currency page, showing the user's balance (if authenticated) and informational cards about earning, spending, trading, and premium features.
frontend/src/pages/Discover.tsx: Renders the experience discovery page with search, category tabs, trending experiences, and a publish dialog for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ExperienceDetails.tsx: Shows detailed information for a single experience including thumbnail, creator info, rating controls, and a play button that simulates launching the experience.
frontend/src/pages/Groups.tsx: Placeholder page for the Groups feature, displaying an empty state card prompting users to join groups.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that shows a personalized welcome card for authenticated users, a recommended experiences grid, and a friend activity sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Placeholder inventory page that displays an empty state card directing users to the Avatar Shop to acquire items.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login form page that accepts username and password, calls the session auth hook, and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile page with avatar, display name, username, and buttons to edit profile or navigate to settings. Wrapped in RequireProfile to enforce authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Account settings page allowing authenticated users to update display name, visibility, language, gender, and password, as well as delete their account. Redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up form page that collects username, optional display name, password, and confirmation, validates inputs, and calls the signup hook before navigating to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Social.tsx: Social hub page with tabbed panels for Friends, Messages, Parties, and Following; shows an AccountsDisabledNotice if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/utils/formatError.ts: Utility function that normalizes any thrown value (Error objects, strings, backend error objects) into a human-readable English message string.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Provides get, set, and clear helpers for persisting a session token in localStorage under a fixed key.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, container queries, animation plugins, and extended theme values like border radius and keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a fix request targeting the Settings page, covering three features: fixing session auth recognition, adding an 'Other' gender option, and adding a change password section. Records known issues, existing feature specs, and a pending new feature request.
